response: Start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sugars in your [product name]. Replace sugary snacks with fresh fruits like apples or berries from your local [grocery store]. Drink water or herbal tea instead of sodas and fruit juices. Plan your meals ahead of time to avoid impulsive sugary cravings. Cook more meals at home so you control exactly what goes into your food. Gradually reduce sugar intake over a few weeks to help your taste buds adjust. Keep a food diary to track your progress and stay motivated.
